title: Materializing properties (triples) accross all graphs causes error on restart
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE graph1 (subject VARCHAR, predicate VARCHAR, object VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO graph1 SELECT DISTINCT subject, 'http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#Property' FROM graph1;
DELETE FROM graph1 WHERE subject IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Materializing properties across all graphs on server restart
